这位大大文笔很成熟，叙事逻辑会让我觉得有实感，文章逻辑性也很强！

人物塑造不是那种很标签式的单薄，而是特别立体的，融合在文章的小细节里的，所以一点都不跳戏，每个人物又立体又有魅力"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708096345,"group_id":"7254941638881971260","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"hello，嘿嘿，啥也不会","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyMbAKjgJtQxfwn8MjmHN7M=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cb05e6926b9442f1bc9de821ab93680e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792636&x-signature=LSfFRsseO2NU7Ydcakwcavr2Cf0%3D","user_id":"254696436535416","user_name":"Velqpsesf"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"254696436535416","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7254941638881971260","book_info":{"abstract":"【双强+日久生情+救赎+双向奔赴+电竞ABO+双洁】（全文已完结）
　　
闷骚大神打野占有欲强Alpha×小少爷天才中单超没安全感Omega  （无原型，很多私设，不接受反驳！！！）

ORL常规赛决赛，TF战队中单齐洛打假赛被别家挖走，新赛季即将开始，最强野王队长陆弋扬从青训营里挑了个小少爷。

带回俱乐部之后，做牛做马做老公。

某天俱乐部：

“啊~张嘴”

“.........”小少爷嗷呜一口。

“真乖，我家安安最厉害了。”
